title: Smoky Roasted Egyptian Coriander Seeds Stir-fry
description: This sour and light Egyptian dish features a midnight craving with the perfect blend of smokiness from coriander seeds, suitable for diabetic-friendly cooking.

ingredients.name: 1 tablespoon ground Egyptian coriander seeds
ingredients.notes: Use certified organic and non-GMO for better health outcomes.

instructions: In a small mixing bowl, combine the ground coriander seeds and minced garlic.
Add turmeric powder to taste for a subtle yellow hue and added health benefits. Mix well.
Spread the mixture evenly on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast in the preheated oven for 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally until fragrant and golden brown, avoiding burning.
Serve immediately as a snack or dip into hummus.
